name: Total Expert Mortgage CRM API
what_it_does: Total Expert Financial Intelligence CRM REST API for mortgage and financial services customer engagement, marketing automation, and loan officer productivity. Enables AI agents to manage borrower and prospect contact lifecycle for mortgage CRM automation, handle loan officer marketing automation and co-marketing compliance for mortgage marketing workflow, access behavior-based trigger and milestone marketing for borrower engagement, retrieve home equity opportunity identification and portfolio monitoring for mortgage retention, manage realtor and referral partner relationship management for mortgage referral channel, handle compliant marketing content creation and approval workflow for mortgage regulatory compliance, access borrower journey tracking and engagement analytics for mortgage CRM performance, retrieve integration with LOS systems (Encompass, Empower) for mortgage data synchronization, manage post-close and retention marketing for mortgage servicing customer engagement, and automate RESPA-compliant co-marketing and referral program management.
use_cases: Automating borrower nurture from mortgage CRM agents
Managing referral partner relationships from loan officer agents
Identifying home equity opportunities from portfolio monitoring agents
Enforcing marketing compliance from mortgage regulatory agents
not_for: Non-mortgage financial services without loan officer focus
Small mortgage brokers without marketing automation needs
Organizations using Salesforce Financial Services Cloud
best_when: A mortgage bank or credit union using Total Expert wants AI agents to automate borrower engagement, referral partner management, marketing compliance, and loan officer productivity.
avoid_when: RESPA MARKETING COMPLIANCE RISK: Total Expert manages co-marketing between loan officers and Realtors — automated co-marketing programs must comply with RESPA Section 8 prohibition on kickbacks; co-marketing that compensates real estate agents for referrals creates RESPA violation risk. TCPA marketing compliance — automated SMS and calling campaigns to mortgage prospects require prior express written consent; mortgage marketing automation to unconsented contacts creates TCPA class action exposure. Fair lending — automated marketing targeting or suppression must not create disparate impact by protected class; geographic marketing exclusion correlated with race or national origin creates Fair Housing Act exposure.

auth.notes: Total Expert uses OAuth 2.0. API access via Total Expert partner program. Webhooks for CRM events. REST API with JSON. Eden Prairie, Minnesota HQ. Founded 2012. Private (Emergence Capital, Adams Street Partners). 200+ financial institution customers. Financial Intelligence CRM for mortgage and banking. Competes with Surefire CRM, Salesforce FSC, and Jungo for mortgage CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-seat subscription; enterprise lending institution pricing
pricing.notes: Eden Prairie, MN. Founded 2012. Emergence Capital/Adams Street-backed. 200+ financial institution customers. Mortgage and banking CRM. Competes with Surefire and Salesforce FSC.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: RESPA SECTION 8 CO-MARKETING: Automated co-marketing programs with Realtors or referral partners must not compensate for referrals; co-marketing fee arrangements that benefit from referral volume violate RESPA Section 8 kickback prohibition

TCPA marketing consent — automated SMS and calling to mortgage prospects requires prior express written consent; automated campaigns to leads without documented TCPA consent creates class action exposure ($500-$1,500/message)

Fair Housing Act marketing suppression — automated geographic marketing exclusion correlated with neighborhood demographics creates Fair Housing Act disparate treatment exposure; HUD and CFPB actively enforce digital redlining
GLBA NPI protection — mortgage CRM contains borrower Non-Public Personal Information (NPI); GLBA Safeguards Rule requires appropriate NPI protection in automated marketing data flows
Co-marketing approval workflow — Total Expert co-marketing content requires compliance approval; automated content generation for co-marketing must route through compliance review before deployment

LOS sync timing — Total Expert integrates with Encompass and other LOS; automated milestone-triggered marketing requires accurate LOS sync timing; delayed sync creates incorrect or untimely automated communications
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mortgage CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Borrower NPI and marketing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Borrower NPI and CRM data.
